invent_allowed: café or office color for Knott's meeting
desk clerks, press-room noise, and filing quirks at research sites
which investigator stands nearest a dangerous window or stair
rat-pack timing and mundane Macario household clutter
epilogue details for survivors after Corbitt is destroyed or the house is resealed
never_invent: that Knott already knows Corbitt is an undead sorcerer
pre-1878 Boston Globe clippings about the Corbitt House
that Corbitt was legally buried in a public cemetery instead of the basement
a second basement entrance that skips the sealed boards
that ordinary prayer or holy water alone permanently destroys Corbitt
a peaceful bargain that leaves Corbitt safely dormant forever without cost
that Vittorio can give a clear tactical briefing beyond the bible gesture

keeper_secrets.prose: Walter Corbitt's body is interred in a sealed basement lair behind boarded walls; his mind still lives and haunts the house.
Corbitt preserved his identity with Mythos magic and animates his own corpse; stats/presentation under monsters.json 'Walter Corbitt' (STR 90 CON 115 POW 90, Dominate, Flesh Ward, claws).
Corbitt's ritual dagger bypasses Flesh Ward and spells; a successful hit turns him to ashes and dust (the-haunting.json corbitt_own_dagger).
The floating knife costs Corbitt 1 Magic Point per combat round and attacks once per round; opposed STR vs POW to keep hold.
Corbitt first misleads and scares (upstairs poltergeist as false center); if investigators persist toward the basement secret, he switches to murder.
Pastor Michael Thomas of the Chapel of Contemplation executed Corbitt's will; the 1912 raid and Thomas's 1917 escape are cult residue, not required for the climax.
